candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, the radius of the known pulley is r, the rotation of the inertia is J, the power coefficient of the spring is $K$, and the mass $M$ of the object. At the beginning of the beginning, the object is static and the spring is not extended. During the fall of the object, there is no relative sliding and the pulley and the pulley, and friction at the axis is negligible. The maximum distance the object can fall is _.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 如图所示<img="q_05711_001.png">，已知滑轮半径为 $r$，转动惯量为 $J$，弹簧劲度系数为 $k$，物体质量为 $m$。设开始时物体静止且弹簧无伸长，在物体下落过程中绳与滑轮无相对滑动，忽略轴间摩擦力，求物体能够下落的最大距离。
